name: Wren - 20x36 Modern Monoslope Roof Shed | Expansive Backyard Studio, Workshop & Multi-Purpose Building (PDF)
open_features: A sleek single-slope roofline delivers bold contemporary architecture while promoting efficient water runoff and simplified construction.
With 720 sq ft of usable space, Wren offers generous room for workshops, studios, offices, storage systems, or creative workspaces.
Clean framing lines, standard materials, and intuitive building geometry make this design ideal for both beginner builders and seasoned DIY enthusiasts.
A well-placed entry door and balanced windows provide easy access while bringing in natural light and fresh airflow.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Wren 20x36 Monoslope Roof Shed - a spacious modern structure designed for efficiency, versatility, and clean architectural style. Featuring a streamlined single-slope roofline, warm horizontal wood siding, and crisp contemporary lines, Wren delivers a refined exterior with exceptional interior potential.
